name_en: N85941 Ostrich! Size Change Chip, (Made of Top Layer!) Card Holder This card holder selects magnificent Ostrich leather, showcasing Louis Vuitton's profound craftsmanship in leather making. Vivid colors inject high-spirited vitality, card slots, compartments, and zip coin purse rich functional design. 8 x 11 x 1 cm
